name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Sacramento, CA's Western Union Money Order Only at 2005 Marconi Ave offers 24-hour money orders and check-cashing services.
description_long:
Located at 2005 Marconi Ave in Sacramento, CA, this Western Union Money Order Only location is a standalone operation open 24 hours every day of the week. Whether you need to send a money order at 3 AM or handle check-cashing on a Sunday afternoon, this Sacramento location accommodates your schedule without restrictions.

This Western Union Money Order Only branch in Sacramento specializes in money orders and check-cashing services for the local community. For questions about fees, current exchange rates, or service details, call +1 916-924-6712 during any hour of the day.

Sacramento, CA residents needing late-night check-cashing or money orders should know this 2005 Marconi Ave location is open 24/7. Bring a valid government-issued ID, and you can handle your financial needs at any hour—whether it's a weekday morning or Sunday midnight in Sacramento.
pros: Extensive physical network with 1,500+ locations at Walmart, grocery chains, and bank partners across the US
Fast cash pickup service—recipients can access funds in minutes using MTCN at participating locations
Hybrid transaction model allows customers to register transfers online/via app and pay in cash in-store to save time
Money orders explicitly positioned as 'trusted alternative to checks' for sending cash securely
Accepts multiple payment methods including cash, debit cards, and credit cards at select locations
Encryption and fraud prevention measures to protect money transfers
International money transfer capability with automatic exchange rate conversion at time of receipt
Bill payment services available at participating locations for utilities, rent, car payments
cons: Service hours and availability vary by host retailer location—no guaranteed consistent access
No in-person currency exchange services offered; exchange rates applied only at time of foreign receipt
Fees vary significantly by transfer method, destination, and payment option with no transparent posted rates on homepage
Prepaid card option requires application and credit check alternative, adding friction to cash-only users
Limited to agent locations at third-party retailers rather than dedicated storefronts, creating dependence on host business hours
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals needing reliable cash-based money movement without a traditional bank account
People sending money internationally who prefer in-person verification and don't need foreign currency exchange
Customers seeking money orders as a secure alternative to mailing checks or cash
Individuals making one-time or occasional bill payments at locations without online bill-pay options
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and international remitters who need reliable in-person cash-based money movement and bill payment services at convenient retail locations. The main caveat is that service quality, hours, and availability depend entirely on the host retailer, and transparent fee information requires visiting a location or using their online calculator rather than being posted upfront.
services: In-person domestic money transfers at agent locations
International money transfers with real-time exchange rates
Money order purchase and cashing at participating locations
Cash pickup via MTCN at participating agent locations
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating locations
Western Union prepaid Visa card application and enrollment
Online/mobile app transfer registration with in-person cash payment completion
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) generation and tracking
Service availability at Walmart locations nationwide
Service availability at bank partner locations
Service availability at grocery chain and retail store locations
Multi-payment option processing (cash, debit, select credit cards)
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 2005 Marconi Ave, Sacramento, CA. Open 24/7 for money orders and check cashing.
